INTERNATIONAL STUDENT APPLICATIONS

International applicants can submit their applications to Istanbul Health and Technology University through the online application portal.

Please ensure that all required documents are scanned and uploaded during the application process. For any inquiries related to your application, kindly contact us at

international@istun.edu.tr

.

APPLY NOW

In-Person Application

Applicants may also apply in person by visiting the International Office located on our main campus.

For detailed information about the office location, please visit:

https://www.istun.edu.tr/en/contact

Please note that copies of all required documents must be submitted during your in-person application.

For further assistance or questions, please contact us at

international@istun.edu.tr

.
